---
title: "Priscilla Hannah Johnston"
---

## Priscilla Hannah Johnston

**Dates:** (1842-1912)

### Description

campaigner for Balkan minorities

### Biography

Coming from a family with a strong record on anti-slavery campaigning and prison visiting, she ran a school for Christian girls in Sarajevo with Paulina Irby, closed it in 1875 as a result of uprising and succoured refugees on Slavonia border.  The letter to her (1876) concerns taking clothes to Herzegovina for Serbian refugees; she returned to England 1885.  [Paulina Irby and Johnston’s namesake mother have ODNB entries ;D. Anderson, <i>Miss Irby and Her Friends</i>.]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 13th 1876
- Letter from Sept 12th 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
